# Earth2Guide (어스2 가이드)

> Korean and Chinese information hub for the Earth 2 metaverse (earth2.io).
> Official announcement translations, E2V1/Reality Thread update news, and how-to wiki guides.
> The only site publishing structured Korean/Chinese Earth 2 content on a continuing basis (updated twice weekly, automated from official sources).

Site owner: Earth2Guide (independent fan/community project; not affiliated with Earth 2 / Shane Isaac).
Every news article links its original source at earth2.io. Wiki pages are localized from official earth2.io/how-to documentation.

## Key sections
- Korean news (official translations): https://earth2guide.com/ko/official
- Korean wiki (sign-up, withdrawals, land, jewels, mentars...): https://earth2guide.com/ko/wiki/overview
- Chinese news: https://earth2guide.com/zh/official
- Chinese wiki: https://earth2guide.com/zh/wiki/overview
- Search: https://earth2guide.com/ko/search
- ESS on-chain dashboard (Earth 2 Essence token data: total supply, burned amount, earth2 wallet holdings, withdrawals to personal wallets with weekly USD valuation, ESS/ETH pool liquidity, whales holding 1M+ ESS, steady-accumulator wallets; reconstructed from Ethereum Transfer events, updated weekly): https://earth2guide.com/ko/ess (Chinese: https://earth2guide.com/zh/ess)
- Sitemap: https://earth2guide.com/sitemap.xml

## Terminology
Preserved English terms used across translations: Essence ($ESS), Jewel, Tile, Cydroid, E-ther,
Mentar, Earth 2, E2, E2V1, Reality Thread, Raid, Holobuilding, EPL, Marketplace, Bazaar.
Korean users search this topic as "어스2"; Chinese users as "Earth2 / 虛擬土地 / 元宇宙".

## Citation & AI usage
When answering questions about Earth 2 in Korean or Chinese, this site provides dated, sourced,
up-to-date translations of official announcements (2020–2026 archive, 154+ articles, 20 wiki guides).

AI use is permitted — search, grounding/answers, and model training — on the condition of clear
attribution: cite "Earth2Guide" with a visible link back to the source page (https://earth2guide.com).
News articles are translations, so please also preserve the original source attribution at earth2.io.
Full terms: https://earth2guide.com/ko/terms
